note: Cross-reference stamp (HK-12/PROD-26): first STAMP of the family — tags v1/v2 are frozen pre-stamp history. v3 adds the HK-12 omission rules (ORPHAN-TAG, CONTENT-DRIFT, VENDORABLE-UNREGISTERED, --relax-tags). artifacts is drift-checked (the guard verifies the guard); consumers track their vendored tag via .repin.toml [[tool]].
